response.global_analysis: 1. JSON Match: The audio is entirely instrumental (no vocals), so the reference lyrics in the JSON do not match any spoken/vocal audio. 2. JSON Usage: Discarded the vocal reference lyrics because the audio is a pure instrumental track. Followed the Visual Events rule to subtitle the prominent on-screen text slides. 3. Timing & Pacing: Subtitles are timed precisely to the visual onset and offset of the informational slides and live logo.

subtitles.original: 開演までしばらくお待ちください
subtitles.english: The concert will be starting soon. Please wait a moment.

subtitles.original: 演出の都合上、照明の明滅にご注意ください / 声出し応援OKです
subtitles.english: Please be aware of flashing lights. Cheering loudly is OK.
Second round of concert goods sales
